project_context.name: DevOps Coding Assistant
project_context.mission: Automate refactoring, testing, and continuous integration pipelines for web applications.
project_context.vision: Provide seamless developer agent support directly inside code editors and CLI terminals.
project_context.problem_statement: Repetitive boilerplate coding and configuration errors slow down feature delivery.

semantic.fact: Monorepo structures are cleaner when workspace dependencies are linked directly using peerDependencies or npm workspaces.

episodic.outcome: React app bundle built successfully in 1.42s
